---
title: 'catalog sync'
---

Pull then push. Equivalent to running [`catalog pull`](pull.qmd) followed by
[`catalog push`](push.qmd).

## Usage

```bash
xorq catalog sync
```

This command takes no command-specific options.

## Example

```bash
xorq catalog sync
```

## See also

- [`catalog pull`](pull.qmd)—pull from remotes
- [`catalog push`](push.qmd)—push to remotes
